dyeaddons.config.debugMessages.name: Select debug messages to see in chat
dyeaddons.config.debugMessages.comment: All will select every debug message, Other will select messages without a category
dyeaddons.config.alwaysHypixelMain.name: Always on Hypixel Main
dyeaddons.config.alwaysHypixelMain.comme: Makes mod think you are always on the main hypixel server
dyeaddons.config.alwaysOnSkyblock.name: Always on Skyblock
dyeaddons.config.alwaysOnSkyblock.commen: Makes mod think you are always on skyblock
dyeaddons.config.rotationOverlayToggle.c: Adds/removes the rotation overlay to your screen
